otherRequirements: Applies to British citizen passports only; other British passport types need a visa
Passport must be valid for at least 150 days after arrival and have at least 1 blank page
Get your passport stamped at land-border crossings
sourceNote: gov.uk Turkey travel advice — visa-free for up to 90 days in any 180-day period (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/turkey/entry-requirements)
